vector_architecture: 5'ITR - B8 - Kozak - IgK SP - Ultra-Mini CDS - stop - WPRE3-compact - bGH polyA - 3'ITR

per_element.source: AAV2 consensus ITR (Samulski 1987); cis replication element
ARBITER synthetic (exact seq proprietary); estimated CpG per panel characterization
GCCACCATG Kozak + IgK V-kappa leader signal peptide, max-freq codons (not yet CpG-depleted)
Choi 2014 Cell 157 truncated WPRE (Addgene #64237 core region)
AAV2 consensus 3' ITR (reverse complement of 5' ITR)

depletion_notes: 5_ITR_AAV2: FIXED — AAV ITR sequences are structurally constrained (cis replication motifs); cannot deplete without breaking packaging
B8_enhancer: estimated; audit once exact sequence in hand
Kozak_IgK_SP: depletable — 60 bp CDS, 3.5% CAI cost acceptable
WPRE3_compact: partially depletable — Choi 2014 core has CpG-containing miRNA seed; some positions structurally constrained for RNA folding
bGH_polyA: partially depletable — polyA signal sequence motifs (AATAAA and downstream GT/T-rich) must be preserved
3_ITR_AAV2: FIXED — AAV ITR sequences are structurally constrained (cis replication motifs); cannot deplete without breaking packaging
disclaimer: Sequences used for CpG counting are canonical published proxies. B8 enhancer is proprietary (estimated 5 CpG). ITR sequences are AAV2 consensus. Real vector assembly will have minor variations (+/- a few CpGs) depending on exact cloning junctions and proprietary element versions.
